'''Mintris''' was a [[Plant/Legends|plant]] that grew on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] as well as its [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]]. They were eaten by [[Muudabok]]s. The plants were used by [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] to make drinking straws, blow darts and were also used in Gungan weaving.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']]
